Let's Eat Together

KAIFUN (Wenxin Branch)

← Back to all restaurants
★★★★★ 4.5
📍 Nantun District, Taichung📅 2026
Sichuan Chinese Family Style
If you’re craving that legit Sichuan kick, KAIFUN Together is a must-visit. Carrying on the torch from the legendary "Fuli Sichuan Cuisine," they specialize in that signature numbing heat. Their menu hits all the right notes: fresh, aromatic, "mā" (numbing), and "là" (spicy). The Wenxin branch is tucked away on the 6th floor of Showtime Live Taichung Wenxin, so you can head straight from the cinema to the table without even leaving the mall. You can't go wrong with their classics. The "Mouth-watering Chicken" comes in a rich peanut and sesame sauce, while the Signature Salt-baked Chicken gets a punchy lift from garlic sprouts and rattan pepper oil. For some real fire, try the "Tumbling Spicy Trio"—a stir-fry of Matsusaka pork (tender pork jowl) and squid—or the "Tear-jerking Eggs," which are crispy fried eggs tossed with large green chilies. If you’re with a group, their set menus are the way to go; the 4-person "Hé cài" (family-style sharing) set is NT$2,160 and covers six dishes, soup, rice, and drinks. Perfect for family dinners, sharing a big meal with friends, and business gatherings.
Good for Family dinners Sharing a big meal with friends Business gatherings

House specialties

Mouth-Watering Chicken (Poached Chicken with Sichuan Chili Oil, Kou Shui Ji) Signature Salt-Baked Chicken (Yan Ju Ji) Sizzling Spicy Trio (Wok-Fried Meat and Seafood with Dried Chilies, Huo La San Bao) Tear-Jerker Eggs (Fried Eggs Stir-Fried with Green Peppers, Cui Lei Dan)

What I ordered

Shrimp with Silky Scrambled Eggs (Xiaren Huadan) Steamed Spare Ribs with Black Beans (Douchi Zheng Paigu) Sautéed Beef with Scallions (Congbao Niurou) Sweet and Sour Chicken Balls (Tangcu Jiqiu) Sliced Pork with Garlic Sauce (Pork Belly with Garlic Puree, Suanni Bairou) Mapo Tofu (Spicy Tofu with Minced Pork, Mapo Doufu) Hakka Stir-fry (Dried Tofu and Pork Stir-fry, Kejia Xiaochao) Hot and Sour Soup (Suanla Tang) Clam Soup (Ginger Clam Soup, Geli Tang) Stir-fried Water Spinach (Sautéed Morning Glory, Chao Kongxincai) Stir-fried Cabbage (Chao Gaolicai) Trio of Side Dishes (Assorted Three-Color Appetizers, Sanse Xiaocai)

Dishes

Restaurant info

Address 6F, Showtime Living Wenxin, No. 289, Wenxin S. Rd., Nantun Dist., Taichung City 408, Taiwan Open in Google Maps →
Phone04-2472-5878
HoursWeekdays 11:30-15:00 / 17:30-21:30; weekends & holidays 11:00-16:00 / 17:00- onwards
ClosedOpen daily
ReservationsReservations accepted
Service+10% service charge
PriceNT$ 400-600 / person
CuisineSichuan・Chinese・Family Style
